problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene may resolve What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
